title: Cyanstone
description: Allows customization of redstone textures using a colormap.
body:
# Cyanstone

Cyanstone is a mod that adds the ability to change the color of redstone and certain redstone blocks using a colormap in resource packs.

Originally, I was just planning on changing the hardcoded colormap to cyan, which gave the name Cyanstone. Now it is possible to edit the redstone color (including particles) using a single texture file!

In 1.21.5+ the vanilla dye color resource packs are _not_ built in. These are held in separate projects to save space on the resource pack screen.

## Resource Packs
- [Aqua (Light Blue)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-aqua)
- [Black](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-black)
- [Blue](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-blue)
- [Brown](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-brown)
- [Cloud (Light Gray)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-cloud)
- [Cyan](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-cyan)
- [Gray](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-gray)
- [Green](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-green)
- [Lime](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-lime)
- [Magenta](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-magenta)
- [Orange](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-orange)
- [Pink](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-pink)
- [Purple](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-purple)
- [White](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-white)
- [Yellow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyanstone-yellow)

There is also a collection for all the resource packs, with the main 15 colors (not including red) being listed above and 15 Pride-themed packs.
The collection: [Cyanstone Resource Packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/XqpNwn0R)

If you have made a resource pack that uses Cyanstone and would like it to be added to the collection, please use the issues link on the right of the screen and let me know!

### Mods Supported
- Chipped (1.20-1.20.1, 1.21-1.21.1)
